title: Tour Animation Test Scenarios
description: Exercises all combinations of focusDirectory and highlightLayers for testing 3D animation behavior

steps.title: S1: Baseline
steps.description: Starting state: full city view with no focus and no highlights. All buildings at normal height with file-type colors.

steps.title: S2: Focus Only
steps.description: Transition T1: Adding focusDirectory. Camera should zoom to src/app/api, non-focused buildings collapse to 5% height and desaturate to gray.

steps.title: S2b: Switch Focus Directory
steps.description: Transition T3: Switching focus directory. Three-phase animation: zoom out, collapse/expand swap, zoom to new focus.

steps.title: S3: Highlight Only (no focus)
steps.description: Transition T2→T4: Remove focus, add highlight. Camera zooms out, buildings expand, then API routes get green highlight while others dim.

steps.title: S4: Focus + Highlight (same)
steps.description: Transition T7: Add focus to existing highlight. Camera zooms to API, others collapse, highlight color maintained.

steps.title: S5: Focus + Highlight (subset)
steps.description: Focus on broader directory (src), highlight only subset (lib). Shows partial highlighting within focused area.

steps.title: S6: Switch Highlight (same focus)
steps.description: Transition T6: Change highlight layers while focus stays same. Camera position unchanged, only colors transition.

steps.title: S7: Multiple Highlights (with focus)
steps.description: Transition T9: Add second highlight layer. Two distinct colors visible within focused area.

steps.title: S8: Multiple Highlights (no focus)
steps.description: Transition T8: Remove focus, keep multiple highlights. Full city view with two distinct highlight colors.

steps.title: S9: Clear All (return to baseline)
steps.description: Transition T10: Remove all highlights and focus. Full reset to baseline state.
